name: FSIL_BlockRxMessage
title: FSIL_BlockRxMessage
syntax: long FSIL_BlockRxMessage(dword pgn, dword sourceAddress, qword filterMask, qword filterValue); // form 1
description: Prevents processing of a received message by the interaction layer.
The message to block is specified by PGN, destination source address and a part of the first eight data bytes.
To revert this command you can use FSIL_ResetBlockedRxMessage or FSIL_ResetAllBlockedRxMessages.

parameters.name: pgn
parameters.description: The message with this PGN shall be blocked.
